text.content:
A robust corporate governance framework and dedication to high ethical standards guide Sailun Group’s worldwide operations. In addition to adhering to strict compliance policies—including anti-bribery guidelines and information security—Sailun continuously refines its internal processes to maintain a healthy and transparent business environment.

Looking ahead, Sailun Group will continue to expand its global partnerships, deliver innovative low-carbon tire solutions, and enhance its contribution to sustainable development and green mobility worldwide.

For more information on MAXAM products or to connect with a local MAXAM representative, visit
